alerts.description:
* WHAT...Southerly winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 45 mph.

* WHERE...East Puget Sound Lowlands.

* WHEN...Until 9 PM PDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds could blow around unsecured objects. Tree limbs could be blown down.

* WHAT...Tornado Warning issued. Rotation detected on radar.

* WHERE...Clark County Washington.

* WHEN...Until 8 PM PDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed.
